summary: Review API Management services for gateway, backend, subscription, named-value, and identity posture that can redirect a trusted API surface.

targets.takeover_reason: trusted gateway, backend target, and consumer/subscription posture are all visible; current identity has visible APIM backend or policy write control

capability_steps.downstream_effect: Keeps clients on the existing APIM hostname and API surface.
capability_steps.boundary: Gateway posture does not prove traffic volume.

capability_steps.downstream_effect: Shows where APIM can forward requests behind the stable front door.
capability_steps.boundary: Backend hostnames do not prove ownership or runtime reachability.

capability_steps.downstream_effect: Can redirect selected API traffic while the published APIM surface remains healthy.
capability_steps.boundary: This command does not collect policy XML bodies by default.

capability_steps.downstream_effect: Existing consumers, subscription gates, and stored config can keep the route looking operational.
capability_steps.boundary: Named-value values and secrets are not printed.

capability_steps.downstream_effect: Normal cover stories include backend migration, failover, version routing, and blue/green release work.
capability_steps.boundary: Cover story is not an intent claim.

current_identity_context.name: azurefox-lab-sp
current_identity_context.summary: Current foothold `azurefox-lab-sp` has visible APIM backend or policy write control.

current_state.posture: 2 gateway hostname(s); 1 backend hostname(s); policy controls: backend-routing, conditional-routing, header-auth, request-rewrite; 2 active subscription(s); secret or Key Vault named-value posture

not_collected_by_default.name: policy XML bodies
not_collected_by_default.reason: The flat helper parses safe policy control types, but does not print raw policy XML or named-value expansions.

not_collected_by_default.name: named-value values
not_collected_by_default.reason: Default output reports secret and Key Vault named-value counts without printing stored values.

not_collected_by_default.name: live request flow
not_collected_by_default.reason: Management-plane posture cannot prove traffic was routed, captured, or modified.

not_collected_by_default.name: backend ownership
not_collected_by_default.reason: A backend hostname does not prove who controls that endpoint or whether it is reachable.

not_collected_by_default.name: activity history
not_collected_by_default.reason: Broad APIM history pulls are not needed for default posture and should be a narrow follow-up only when timing or actor proof matters.

targets.summary: service "apim-edge-01" ranks 5/5 for APIM resource-hijack posture; 2 gateway hostname(s); 1 backend hostname(s); current identity can modify APIM backend or policy posture from visible RBAC.
